human_actions_pending.context: Auth and deck saving require NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY. supabase/schema.sql is ready to run.

human_actions_pending.context: Project builds clean. Needs Vercel project creation and env vars set in dashboard.

decisions.decision: Grid images use /low.webp + unoptimized; modal keeps /high.webp
decisions.rationale: Low-res sufficient for thumbnails, eliminates Next.js proxy overhead

decisions.decision: SVG inline energy icons instead of external image URLs
decisions.rationale: TCGdex type image URL pattern unverified; SVGs are reliable, instant, zero deps

decisions.decision: Set sort uses direct string > comparison not localeCompare
decisions.rationale: localeCompare is locale-sensitive and may break YYYY/MM/DD date format ordering

decisions.decision: Era-priority scoring fallback (sv > swsh > sm > xy > ...) when releaseDate absent
decisions.rationale: TCGdex brief set response may not include releaseDate; ID-based score is reliable proxy

decisions.decision: Trainer effect shown in dedicated seeker-blue box, not mixed with Pokemon flavor text
decisions.rationale: Original code showed effect as flavor text + duplicated it in effect section

decisions.decision: filter-label and filter-input as @layer components CSS utilities
decisions.rationale: DRY — used across 9 filter inputs in the panel

next_action: Ask user if they have Supabase set up. If yes, get env vars and implement auth end-to-end. If no, guide through setup then implement: install @supabase/supabase-js + @supabase/ssr, create src/lib/supabase/ utilities, build /signup and /login pages, add middleware.ts, protect /decks and /dashboard, wire Save Deck button.
context_notes: Card browser is now in excellent shape. Build is clean (0 TS errors). All polish tasks done this session: fast image loading, dynamic newest-set featured display, powerful 9-field filter panel, grid/list/table views, real bottom pagination, SVG energy icons, retreat cost icons, trainer card info. The featured set may still show wrong set depending on what TCGdex returns — if so, the era-priority fallback should handle sv-era sets correctly. Main gap: auth. supabase/schema.sql already written and ready.
